Test scripts for hexadecimal to decimal conversion, type of negative infinity, and zero vs. negative infinity.


## Files
- **[08.05-001.js](08.05-001.js.md)**: A test script that verifies hexadecimal to decimal conversion in JavaScript.
- **[08.05-002.js](08.05-002.js.md)**: Tests if the type of negative infinity is a number.
- **[08.05-003.js](08.05-003.js.md)**: Tests the assertion that zero is greater than negative infinity.
